name: cli-agent-resume
description: CLI-aesthetic browser-based developer portfolio with AI agent

scripts.postinstall: find node_modules -mindepth 3 -name 'package.json' -path '*/@codemirror/state/package.json' -exec dirname {} \; | xargs rm -rf 2>/dev/null; rm -rf node_modules/.vite
scripts._postinstall_note: Workaround for a nested @codemirror/state version conflict: transitive deps bring in mismatched versions that break CodeMirror's shared StateField registry. We pin @codemirror/state@6.4.0 in overrides and this script removes any nested copies that npm still unpacks, then clears the Vite dep cache so it resolves cleanly on next dev/build.
